name: Hadco Corp Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: OpenCorporates / CA Secretary of State (foreign-qualified branch of NH-based Hadco Corporation, entity C1845386)
notes: Name 'Which Will Do Bus' is a truncation of California's standard formal-name suffix 'Which Will Do Business In Calif. As [DBA]' used when a foreign corporation registers under an alternate California name. The actual entity is Hadco Corporation, a New Hampshire-headquartered printed circuit board manufacturer (founded 1966 in MA as Hadco Printed Circuits, renamed Hadco Corp in 1982; later acquired by Sanmina). The San Jose CA address 2700 N 1st St was a Hadco manufacturing facility (later Sanmina-SCI). This is NOT a student-transportation / school-bus operator. No matching SAFER carrier record found under HADCO, HADCO CORP, or with 'bus' classification at the San Jose address. Recommend removing from Summit tuck-in pipeline as a list-extraction false positive.
